action: Click on the Google Chrome icon on the desktop or taskbar to open the Chrome browser.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer

recipe.steps: The instruction is to open Google Chrome by clicking its icon on the desktop or taskbar. On the current screen, the Google Chrome icon is visible (Box ID: 748). To proceed, I should left-click on this icon to open the Chrome browser.

The previous actions successfully clicked on the Google Chrome icon to open the browser. Now, looking at the current screen, the Chrome browser does not appear to be open yet, or it may be loading. To ensure the browser opens, I should wait a moment to allow the application to launch.
